title: Aaron Clark Eva Monkey article in Otaku USA Feb 14 issue
display_title: Aaron Clark Eva Monkey article in Otaku USA Feb 14 issue
wikitext:
[]: Aaron Clark (Eva Monkey) article in Otaku USA (Feb '14 issue             Quote Post by JeffersonLeeEng » Fri Nov 22, 2013 12:00 pm Our very own Aaron Clark (Eva Monkey) can check yet another accomplishment off his bucket list. In the latest issue of Otaku USA (cover date: February 2014), he written a fine article on--what else?-- Evangelion 3.0: You Can (Not) Redo . Currently, there is no online version of the article, but allow me to give a few teaser scans from the first two pages...

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 22, 2013 1:22 pm Well, somebody's getting famous out in the real world. My congrats to Aaron.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 22, 2013 1:31 pm AND I GOT PAID FOR IT TOO

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 22, 2013 1:32 pm Do you have a copy of the article that you wrote that can be shared with us without violating any copyrights?

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Fri Nov 22, 2013 1:52 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: AND I GOT PAID FOR IT TOO

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Nov 22, 2013 2:08 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: AND I GOT PAID FOR IT TOO

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Nov 22, 2013 2:17 pm Oh god now I have to buy an issue of Otaku USA.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 22, 2013 2:22 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Do you have a copy of the article that you wrote that can be shared with us without violating any copyrights?

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Nov 22, 2013 2:36 pm Congratulations Eva Monkey!! sorry I just had to..

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 2:48 pm Bonus, the issue has a 3.0 cover, so adding this to my pick up one of these days list. And now we have something for Aaron to sign when you meet him in person. Good luck on the job search too.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Nov 22, 2013 2:56 pm AR-99 wrote: And now we have something for Aaron to sign when you meet him in person.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 3:15 pm Shouldn't the title of the thread be changed to "upcoming issue" or February 2014 issue? Recent sounds like it happened already.

[]:             Quote Post by JeffersonLeeEng » Fri Nov 22, 2013 5:11 pm AR-99 wrote: Shouldn't the title of the thread be changed to "upcoming issue" or February 2014 issue? Recent sounds like it happened already.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 5:57 pm ^OK. But putting the date in the thread title will give a frame of reference, which "recent ish" won't after 2/14 passes.

[]:             Quote Post by JeffersonLeeEng » Fri Nov 22, 2013 10:48 pm Well, I guess if you're going to quibble... (although, no close parenthesis...character limit for topic sucks)

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 11:19 pm Thank you. What was your opinion on the article?

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Sat Nov 23, 2013 12:53 am Two things: 1. Awesome, congrats Eva Monkey. 2. lolwut, there's still a US anime magazine in print?

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Nov 23, 2013 2:08 am It's the only anime magazine I see anymore. Comes out bimonthly and reminds me of a very stripped-down Newtype.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 26, 2013 3:31 pm The issue is now on newsstands. Here's the cover: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Nov 26, 2013 4:19 pm It should say, "Exclusive interview: Aaron Clark".
